description: Formal document initiating the project, defining its objectives, scope, stakeholders, and high-level responsibilities. It serves as a reference point throughout the project lifecycle. Audience: All project stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Define project goals and objectives based on the goal statement.
Identify key stakeholders and their roles.
Outline project scope, deliverables, and success criteria.
Establish high-level budget and timeline.
Obtain approval from Digitaliseringsstyrelsen (or relevant authority).

description: A high-level framework outlining the approach to demonstrating the technical feasibility of platform-neutral and fallback-capable authentication. It defines the scope of the technical demonstrators, success metrics, and strategic choices. Audience: Technical team, Digitaliseringsstyrelsen.
steps_to_create: Define the scope of the technical demonstrators (FIDO2, browser-based fallback).
Establish success metrics for the demonstrators (completion, acceptance by reviewers).
Outline strategic choices (single method vs. multiple methods).
Identify potential risks and mitigation strategies.
Incorporate findings from existing technical reports and standards.

description: A strategic plan outlining the approach to influencing Digitaliseringsstyrelsen and other stakeholders. It defines the framing and messaging used to advocate for platform neutrality and fallback access. Audience: Policy team, Digitaliseringsstyrelsen.
steps_to_create: Define the key messages and framing (resilience, continuity, supplier concentration).
Identify target stakeholders and their interests.
Outline strategic choices (continuity vs. privacy arguments).
Develop a communication plan for engaging with stakeholders.
Incorporate findings from existing policy reports and regulations.

description: A strategic plan outlining the approach to building a broad coalition of support spanning civil society, privacy advocates, researchers, and policymakers. Audience: Coalition Coordinator, project team.
steps_to_create: Identify potential coalition members (civil society, privacy advocates, researchers).
Define the scope and composition of the coalition.
Outline strategic choices (narrow vs. broad coalition).
Develop a communication plan for engaging with coalition members.
Establish metrics for measuring coalition success (size, diversity, influence).

description: A framework outlining the approach to shaping AltID procurement documents to include requirements for platform neutrality and fallback access. Audience: Procurement team, Digitaliseringsstyrelsen.
steps_to_create: Analyze existing AltID procurement documents.
Identify opportunities to include platform-neutrality language.
Outline strategic choices (general language vs. specific requirements).
Develop a plan for engaging with Digitaliseringsstyrelsen on procurement.
Incorporate findings from legal and regulatory reviews.

description: A strategic plan outlining the approach to influencing European Digital Identity Wallet standards to support platform-neutral access and certified fallback mechanisms. Audience: EU Engagement team, Digitaliseringsstyrelsen.
steps_to_create: Identify relevant EU bodies and technical working groups.
Analyze existing EU standards and guidelines.
Outline strategic choices (monitoring vs. active engagement).
Develop a communication plan for engaging with EU bodies.
Incorporate findings from technical feasibility studies.

description: A comprehensive register of all identified project risks, their likelihood, impact, and mitigation strategies. It is a living document that is updated throughout the project lifecycle. Audience: Project team, stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Identify potential risks based on project plan, SWOT analysis, and expert input.
Assess the likelihood and impact of each risk.
Develop mitigation strategies for each risk.
Assign responsibility for monitoring and managing each risk.
Regularly review and update the risk register.

description: A plan outlining how project information will be communicated to stakeholders, including the frequency, channels, and responsible parties. It ensures that stakeholders are kept informed of project progress and any issues that may arise. Audience: Project team, stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholders and their communication needs.
Define communication channels and frequency.
Assign responsibility for communication tasks.
Establish a process for managing communication requests.
Regularly review and update the communication plan.

description: A high-level schedule outlining the key project milestones and deadlines. It provides a roadmap for the project and helps to track progress. Audience: Project team, stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Identify key project milestones and deliverables.
Estimate the time required to complete each task.
Sequence the tasks and create a project timeline.
Identify critical path activities.
Regularly review and update the project schedule.
